data/maps/MtPyre_1F/text.inc.MtPyre_1F_Text_196151: All sorts of beings wander the slopes\nof MT. PYRE...\pThere is no telling what may happen.\nTake this. It's for your own good.
data/maps/MtPyre_1F/text.inc.MtPyre_1F_Text_1961CE: Have a POKéMON hold that\nCLEANSE TAG.\pIt will help ward off wild POKéMON.
data/maps/MtPyre_1F/text.inc.MtPyre_1F_Text_196218: Did you come to pay your respect\nto the spirits of departed POKéMON?\pYou must care for your POKéMON a lot.
data/maps/MtPyre_1F/text.inc.MtPyre_1F_Text_196283: This is the final resting place of my\nZIGZAGOON. I cherished it...
